sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, data) VALUES (1, 'hello world'), (2, 'fuzzy testing'), (3, 'SQL 92 compliance');
SELECT id, substring(data, 1, 5) AS sub_data FROM test_strings WHERE substring(data, 1, 5) != 'hello';
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings t2 WHERE t2.id != test_strings.id) > 0;
SELECT id, substring(data, 2, 3) FROM test_strings WHERE substring(data, 2, 3) != 'el';
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_strings GROUP BY substring(data, 1, 1) HAVING COUNT(*) != 1;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_strings AS (SELECT id, data FROM test_strings WHERE data LIKE 'f%');
SELECT id FROM temp_strings WHERE (SELECT substring(data, 1, 2) FROM temp_strings t2 WHERE t2.id != temp_strings.id) != 'fu';
SELECT id, substring(data, 1, CASE WHEN id = 1 THEN 5 ELSE 6 END) AS trimmed_data FROM test_strings WHERE trimmed_data != 'hell';
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE (SELECT substring(data, 1, 5) FROM test_strings t2 WHERE t2.id != test_strings.id) IS NOT NULL;
